news.headline: Netherlands December imports decline 1.1% year on year
XRP gains 4% as SEC acknowledges Grayscale ETF filing, outshining BTC and ETH which fell 0.33% and 1.18%.
news.summary: XRP experienced a significant surge in value on Thursday after the SEC recognized an ETF application by Grayscale Investments. The third-largest cryptocurrency saw a gain of over 4% in the last 24 hours, contrasting with a slight decrease of 0.33% for Bitcoin and 1.18% for Ethereum during the same period. The SEC's call for comments on Grayscale's ETF application contributed to XRP's outperformance. This move follows a public request for submissions within 21 days of publication.

news.headline: Discover Guangzhou's booming industry along the Pearl River, producing cheap goods exported globally. #China #exports #Guangzhou
news.summary: In southern China along the Pearl River, there is a rapidly expanding industry that is producing inexpensive clothing and toys. These products are being exported worldwide without any duty fees.

news.headline: Investors' excessive optimism about gold may lead to a market downturn. Be cautious as gold prices soar.
Fayafi's Euroclear securities now trading on investment platforms, offer up to 15% yields. UAE firm on SIX Swiss Exchange.
news.summary: Fayafi Investment Holding, registered as SPV Fayafi Investment on the SIX Swiss Exchange and listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange, has introduced a distinctive bridge for converting investments into digital assets, offering investors the opportunity to earn yields of up to 15%. This marks the first instance of a UAE company being listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange. The announcement was made on February 14, 2025, in Dubai, UAE.

news.headline: Longines partners with Henry Cavill as newest Ambassador of Elegance, reflecting timeless elegance meets modern spirit.
news.summary: In Miami on February 14, 2025, it was announced that Longines has appointed Henry Cavill as their latest Ambassador of Elegance. Cavill, a well-known actor, is recognized for his blend of sophistication and genuineness, aligning well with the brand's belief that elegance is more than just appearance. This collaboration signifies a significant partnership for Longines, leveraging Cavill's star power and charm to enhance their brand image.

news.headline: EU cutting back technology regulation to boost artificial intelligence investment: Financial Times
Podcast: How would Adam Smith view Donald Trump? - Listen for insights on Bloomberg.
Two Estonian nationals admit guilt in $577M HashFlare Ponzi scheme. Could get 20 years for deceiving investors with fake crypto mining.
news.summary: The duo, potentially facing a 20-year prison sentence, did not possess the required computational capacity to fulfill the cryptocurrency mining activities they had pledged to investors.

news.headline: BOJ offers to lend government debt on spot after noon
Michigan House presents bill enabling state to purchase and loan crypto to boost state funds yield.
news.summary: Legislation introduced in the Michigan House proposes enabling the state to purchase cryptocurrency and subsequently lend it out to bolster returns on state funds.

news.headline: Economist Peter Schiff criticizes GameStop's potential Bitcoin move, calls it a 'Hail Mary'; GameStop's stock surged 440%.
news.summary: Economist Peter Schiff criticized GameStop Corp.'s potential investment in Bitcoin, viewing it as a desperate attempt for relevance. Schiff, known for his insights, stated that GameStop lacked a strong business strategy and considered the move a risky endeavor. He argued that Bitcoin, in his opinion, was currently overvalued, making the decision by GameStop even more questionable. GameStop's consideration of adding Bitcoin to its portfolio is seen as a high-risk move amidst existing market conditions.

Freddy's declares Feb 24 as National Steakburger Day, offering $1 Original Doubles in-app. -Wichita, Kan Feb 13, 2025.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, the fast-casual restaurant Freddy's Frozen Custard & Steakburgers® headquartered in Wichita, Kansas, announced the establishment of a new national holiday, National Steakburger Day, to be celebrated on February 24. To mark the occasion, the brand is offering an exclusive in-app promotion.

news.headline: Biologics Conference 2025 in Mumbai sets new benchmarks in biopharmaceutical innovation with 5th Annual Summit.
news.summary: In Mumbai, India, on February 14, 2025, the Institute of Chemical Technology partnered with the Mumbai Biocluster to organize the 5th Annual Summit of Biologics Conference. This event, held on January 30-31, 2025, put a spotlight on Biopharmaceutical Product Development through various workshops and discussions.

SEC accepts Grayscale's XRP & Dogecoin ETF filings. Decision expected by mid-October on their approval.
news.summary: By mid-October, the Securities and Exchange Commission is expected to make a decision regarding the approval of Grayscale's XRP and Dogecoin ETFs. This deadline highlights the imminent determination on the fate of these exchange-traded funds.

Pulse Seismic Inc. announced 2024 financial results and dividends with TSX:PSD and OTCQX:PLSDF.
news.summary: Pulse Seismic Inc., based in Calgary, Alberta, has released its financial and operational performance details for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. The company, listed as (TSX:PSD) (OTCQX:PLSDF), announced that its audited consolidated financial statements, along with relevant notes and MD&A, are now accessible on SEDAR+ (www.sedarplus.ca) and will soon be posted on Pulse’s official website at www.pulseseismic.com.

news.headline: Harbour BioMed reports profit ranging between RMB7.3-22 million for 2024, with record-high cash profit of RMB220 million.
news.summary: Harbour BioMed, a global biopharmaceutical company focusing on immunology and oncology, has reported its latest business progress. Based on a preliminary review of its unaudited consolidated management accounts for the year ending December 31, 2024, the Company expects a total profit ranging from RMB7.3 million to RMB22 million. Additionally, Harbour BioMed achieved a cash profit of RMB220 million during this period, indicating robust financial performance for the company.

news.headline: China sees one-year bond yield increase 9bps amid tight liquidity

Coway's Q4 revenue: KRW 1,125.7B (+12.1% YoY) with operating profit: KRW 183.4B (+10.4% YoY). FY2024 revenue: KRW 4,310.1B (+8.7% YoY) with operating profit: KRW 795.4B (+8.8% YoY).
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Coway recorded a revenue of KRW 1,125.7 billion, marking a 12.1% increase compared to the previous year. The operating profit for the same period was KRW 183.4 billion, reflecting a 10.4% year-on-year growth. For the full fiscal year of 2024, Coway's annual revenue stood at KRW 4,310.1 billion, up by 8.7% from the previous year. The operating profit for the fiscal year was KRW 795.4 billion, showing an 8.8% increase compared to the previous year. Looking ahead, Coway intends to implement strategies to further drive growth and...

news.headline: Sierra College appoints Anabel Toche as Executive Dean of Student Equity and Completion to champion success and equity.
news.summary: Sierra College in Rocklin, California has recently appointed Anabel Toche as its new Executive Dean of Student Equity and Completion. This decision was made public on February 13, 2025. Toche’s main focus will be on championing student success and leading initiatives to promote equity on campus. This appointment not only highlights the college's commitment to supporting their students but also emphasizes their dedication to ensuring completion rates are improved. This new role signifies a key step in the college's efforts to enhance the overall student experience.

news.headline: Coinbase CEO calls for Congress to clarify token classification as securities or commodities, seeks stablecoin regulation to drive crypto investments.
news.summary: The CEO of Coinbase Global Inc. emphasized the importance of comprehensive legislation on token classification and stablecoins during the company’s 2024 fourth-quarter earnings call. Brian Armstrong highlighted the urgent need for clarity on whether tokens are considered commodities, securities, payment or currency stablecoins, or unregulated entities like non-fungible tokens. He believes that resolving this issue through new legislation or congressional action would facilitate the influx of significant amounts of capital into the cryptocurrency market. This push for regulatory guidance aims to encourage investor confidence and participation in the evolving digital asset landscape.

news.headline: South Korea boosts preparedness amid Trump's reciprocal tariffs.
Office Properties Income Trust updates private exchange offers for senior unsecured notes. Supplement includes financial info from 10-K. Nasdaq: OPI.
news.summary: In Newton, Massachusetts, Office Properties Income Trust (Nasdaq: OPI) has provided an update on its private exchange offers. The Offering Memorandum from February 7, 2025, has been supplemented for the Exchange Offers. These offers involve exchanging existing senior unsecured notes due in 2026, 2027, and 2031 (referred to as Existing Notes) for new 8.000% Senior Priority Guaranteed Unsecured Notes due 2030 (referred to as New Notes). This exchange aims to facilitate the transition between the noted securities, providing potential benefits for the organization and stakeholders.

news.headline: Coinbase CEO predicts 10% of world GDP to move onto crypto by 2030, citing supportive Congress for new regulations.
news.summary: According to Brian Armstrong, the United States currently boasts the most supportive Congress for cryptocurrencies witnessed thus far. This positive stance is expected to bring about a significant shift in global crypto regulations.

news.headline: Fosun International remains in S&P Global's Sustainability Yearbook 2025 for the second year in a row.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 13, 2025, the Sustainability Yearbook 2025 was released by S&P Global. Fosun International Limited (HKEX Stock Code: 00656) was included in the yearbook for the second year in a row. This recognition signifies Fosun International's ongoing commitment to sustainability initiatives.

news.headline: Apple aims to upgrade iPhones in China with AI by mid-year, Bloomberg reports.
Chinese New Year celebrated in Sweden by Zhejiang Happy Chinese New Year troupe on Feb 9, following event in Malta.
news.summary: On February 9th, 2025, the Zhejiang Happy Chinese New Year performance ensemble presented their cultural exhibition in Sweden after a prosperous Spring Festival event in Malta. This endeavor was orchestrated by the Zhejiang Provincial Department of Culture, Radio, and saw participation of a talented troupe consisting of performers showcasing traditional Chinese New Year festivities. The event garnered significant attention with a total audience of over 1,000 attendees in Sweden.

news.headline: LONGi awarded 'A-' for Water Security by CDP, global nonprofit. Shows leadership in sustainability with high score.
news.summary: In Xi'an, China, on February 13, 2025, it was reported that on February 7, 2025, the well-known global non-profit organization, CDP, unveiled the ratings for the 2024 Climate Change, Water Security, and Forests surveys. The report revealed that LONGi achieved an 'A-' Leadership Level score for their performance.

SEC notes Grayscale's Dogecoin ETF filing; review process pending. Dogecoin ETF may become first meme coin fund.
news.summary: A proposal for a Dogecoin Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) is gaining traction on Wall Street, transforming what initially started as a joke into a potential success. If approved, this ETF would be the first of its kind to focus on a meme coin.
